commit.message:
fix(viewer-chat): properly query YouTube live chat ID using channel filter

Fixed getYouTubeLiveChatID to correctly find the streamer's active livestream
by filtering by channelID instead of querying the viewer's own broadcasts.

The function now:
1. Uses Search API to find live videos on the target channel
2. Extracts the video ID from search results
3. Queries Videos API to get liveStreamingDetails.activeLiveChatId

This fixes the "streamer is not currently live" error that occurred even when
the streamer was actively streaming, because the previous implementation was
querying the viewer's broadcasts instead of the streamer's.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CAS buffer creation crash; degrade gracefully on resource failure

CreateBuffer(Span<float>) was corrupting D3D device state causing
NullReferenceException in subsequent CreateTexture2D calls. Replaced
with parameterless constructor + lazy Map/WriteDiscard init. Wrapped
all CAS resource creation in try-catch so failures simply disable
sharpening without affecting the main render path.

commit.message:
fix: accuracy improvements — contact fields 81%->100%, skill F1 88%->92%

rule_extractor.py:
- Add Git, GitHub, GitLab, Jira, Confluence, Postman to skill taxonomy
- Add _is_valid_name(): blocks NLP bridge from overriding correct regex
  name with tech terms (e.g. spacy NER mis-tagging "Spring Boot" as PERSON)
- Add _is_valid_location(): blocks skill lists like "React, Docker" being
  set as location; validates against taxonomy word set
- Fix location fallback to check first 5 lines only, skip skill-header lines
- Strip city-only from primary location match (removes trailing company names)
- NLP bridge phone no longer overrides regex result when regex already found one

output.py:
- Filter LLM skills through taxonomy before merging with rules output;
  prevents Mistral ghost skills ("statistics", "website", "microservices")

main.py:
- Add missing Form import (caused NameError crash on startup)

Composite accuracy: 87.0% -> 93.8% on 4-case rules-mode benchmark

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

proxy LCD and RPC through Vercel to fix mixed content

LCD (port 1317) and RPC (port 26657) are HTTP-only, blocked by
browsers on HTTPS. Route them through /lcd and /rpc relative paths
proxied by Vercel rewrites and Vite dev server proxy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix incident answer flicker: defer state updates until validation completes

Previously, setIncidentSubmitted(true) fired before the async
checkIncidentAnswer RPC resolved, causing a render where the selected
answer briefly showed as incorrect (red) before flipping to correct
(green). Now all answer state (answer, submitted, result) is set
atomically after validation, and a ref guards against double-clicks
during the async wait.

commit.message:
Allow API key generate when .api_key file deleted; install.sh deletes key before build

Middleware now checks if .api_key file exists on disk for the
/api/apikey/generate endpoint. If the file was deleted (by install.sh
or manually), generate is allowed without auth even if the server
still has an old key in memory. This enables seamless reinstall flow:
install.sh deletes key → server allows generate → user gets new key.

commit.message:
feat: migrate to monthly data resolution and rewrite simulation engine

Data architecture:
- Replace annual DataSeries with MonthlyDataSeries across all data files
- Delete old src/data/returns/ and src/data/inflation/ annual files
- Add src/data/raw/ (monthly source data from CSV imports) and
  src/data/compiled/ (pre-built YYYYMM-keyed Maps consumed by engine)
- Asset returns (SP500, T-Bond, Gold) sourced from ERN SWR Toolbox /
  Shiller (1871-01 to 2025-11, 1859 months)
- US inflation sourced from BLS (1914-01 to 2025-12, 1343 months)
- Singapore inflation sourced from SG Dept of Statistics
  (1962-01 to 2025-12, 768 months)
- Add import scripts (import-ern.ts, import-inflation.ts) and
  compile-data.ts to regenerate compiled Maps from raw data

Simulation engine:
- Rewrite simulate.ts to run one simulation per valid start month
  instead of per start year (month-anchored windows throughout)
- Compiled returns use 12-month compound windows keyed by YYYYMM;
  inflation maps store raw monthly YoY values
- Range intersection uses linear month indices for correctness
- startMonth stored on SimulationResult and YearResult

commit.message:
Disable Opus FEC and DTX to prevent SILK mode and tail clipping

useinbandfec=0 prevents encoder from preferring SILK (voice) mode,
usedtx=0 prevents encoder from going silent on low-energy tails.
Both cause artifacts at the "ends of sounds" in music.
